title: Parrot's Fishing Crates
description: An expansion to fishing not adding fish but instead four tiers of crates you can find while fishing, as well as loot to fill them!
body:
# Parrot's Fishing Crates 

is an expansion to fishing - not adding fish but instead four tiers of crates you can find while fishing, as well as loot to fill them!

_Feel free to use this mod in any modpacks!_

The four crate tiers are:
1. Fishing Crate
2. Sunken Crate
3. Abyssal Crate
4. Leviathan Crate

## Loot

### Basic Fishing Crate
The basic fishing crate can drop:
- Rusty Weapons
> Including the Rusty Axe and Rusty Sword, these weapons are slightly stronger than iron in base stats and will inflict Poison 4 for one second when hitting a mob.
- Resources
> Iron, gold, and nautilus shells can also be found in these crates.
- Misc
> The fishing crate will also have some random seagrass, kelp, or string inside.

### Sunken Crate
The sunken crate can drop:
- Rusty Weapons
> The sunken crate can drop the same rusty weapons as found in the basic fishing crate.
- Lucky Coin
> A special coin that, on use, will give either Luck 5 or Bad Luck 5 for 10 seconds with a 50/50 chance.
- Resources
> Gold, emeralds, nautilus shells, and sometimes a diamond or two can be found.
- Misc
> Same as the basic fishing crate, the sunken crate will also have some random seagrass, kelp, or string inside, although less.

### Abyssal Crate
The abyssal crate can drop:
- Diamond Weapons
> The abyssal crate has a chance to drop a diamond sword or axe.
- Lucky Coin
> A special coin that, on use, will give either Luck 5 or Bad Luck 5 for 10 seconds with a 50/50 chance.
- Enchanted Fishing Rod
> An enchanted fishing rod can drop from the abyssal crate. It may be cursed, though!
- Resources
> Emeralds, emerald blocks, gold, and more diamonds can be found in these crates.
- Prismarine
> Unlike any other crate, the abyssal crate will contain prismarine shards or crystals.

### Leviathan Crate
The leviathan crate can drop:
- Diamond Gear
> The leviathan crate can drop diamond swords, axes, blocks, or just diamonds.
- Highly Enchanted Fishing Rod
> The leviathan crate will drop a more highly enchanted fishing rod than the abyssal crate.
- Emeralds
> The leviathan crate is guaranteed to drop many emeralds and emerald blocks.
- Bones
> The leviathan crate will contain some bones and bone blocks.
- Totem of Undying
> A guaranteed drop from the leviathan crate.

## Luck

There is a base chance of reeling in a crate of 4%.

You can increase your chances of reeling in a fishing crate in two ways:
1. Fishing while it's raining will increase your chances by 1%
2. Fishing with Luck of the Sea enchantment will increase your chances by 1% every level

(The chances are not changed by the Luck status effect)

So, with Luck of the Sea III during rain you will have an 8% chance of reeling in a crate.

However, the crates themselves also have different rarities. While the basic Fishing Crate is the most likely, the Sunken Crate is 3x as rare to reel in. The Abyssal Crate is 3x rarer than that, and the Leviathan Crate is 3x rarer than the Abyssal Crate!

When using this mod, if you're not just always fishing I would recommend also using a mod like https://modrinth.com/mod/useful-luck due to the Lucky Coin being kind of useless otherwise.
